Package noppes.npcs.api.handler

Interface IAbilityHandler

  • public interface IAbilityHandler
    Handler for ability management. Allows scripts to query ability types, built-in abilities, and custom ability presets.

    Access via API.getAbilities()

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean deleteChainedAbilityByName​(String name)
      Delete a chained ability by name.
      boolean deleteCustomAbilityByName​(String name)
      Delete a custom ability preset by name.
      String[] getAbilityNameArray()
      Get all built-in ability names.
      IChainedAbility getChainedAbility​(String name)
      Get a chained ability by name.
      String[] getChainedAbilityNames()
      Get all chained ability names.
      String[] getCustomAbilityNameArray()
      Get all custom ability preset names.
      String[] getTypes()
      Get all registered ability type IDs.
      boolean hasAbilityName​(String name)
      Check if a built-in ability exists by name.
      boolean hasChainedAbilityName​(String name)
      Check if a chained ability exists by name.
      boolean hasCustomAbilityName​(String name)
      Check if a custom ability preset exists by name.
      boolean hasType​(String typeId)
      Check if an ability type is registered.
      boolean saveChainedAbility​(IChainedAbility chain)
      Save a chained ability.

    • Method Detail

      • getTypes

        String[] getTypes()
        Get all registered ability type IDs.
        Returns:
        array of all registered ability type IDs

      • hasType

        boolean hasType​(String typeId)
        Check if an ability type is registered.
        Parameters:
        typeId - the ability type ID to check
        Returns:
        true if the type is registered

      • getAbilityNameArray

        String[] getAbilityNameArray()
        Get all built-in ability names.
        Returns:
        array of all registered ability names (built-in and custom)

      • hasAbilityName

        boolean hasAbilityName​(String name)
        Check if a built-in ability exists by name.
        Parameters:
        name - the ability name to check
        Returns:
        true if an ability with this name exists

      • getCustomAbilityNameArray

        String[] getCustomAbilityNameArray()
        Get all custom ability preset names.
        Returns:
        array of all custom (user-created) ability names

      • hasCustomAbilityName

        boolean hasCustomAbilityName​(String name)
        Check if a custom ability preset exists by name.
        Parameters:
        name - the custom ability name to check
        Returns:
        true if a custom ability with this name exists

      • deleteCustomAbilityByName

        boolean deleteCustomAbilityByName​(String name)
        Delete a custom ability preset by name.
        Parameters:
        name - the custom ability name to delete
        Returns:
        true if deleted successfully

      • getChainedAbilityNames

        String[] getChainedAbilityNames()
        Get all chained ability names.
        Returns:
        array of all chained ability names

      • hasChainedAbilityName

        boolean hasChainedAbilityName​(String name)
        Check if a chained ability exists by name.
        Parameters:
        name - the chained ability name to check
        Returns:
        true if a chained ability with this name exists

      • deleteChainedAbilityByName

        boolean deleteChainedAbilityByName​(String name)
        Delete a chained ability by name.
        Parameters:
        name - the chained ability name to delete
        Returns:
        true if deleted successfully

      • getChainedAbility

        IChainedAbility getChainedAbility​(String name)
        Get a chained ability by name.
        Parameters:
        name - the chained ability name
        Returns:
        the chained ability, or null if not found

      • saveChainedAbility

        boolean saveChainedAbility​(IChainedAbility chain)
        Save a chained ability. If a chain with the same name exists, it is overwritten.
        Parameters:
        chain - the chained ability to save
        Returns:
        true if saved successfully
